SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class LoopSpecImpl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.LoopSpecImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
LoopSpecification, SpecificationElement
public final class LoopSpecImpl extends Object implements LoopSpecification
Standard implementation of the LoopInvariant interface.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LoopSpecImpl(LoopStatement loop, IProgramMethod pm, KeYJavaType kjt, JTerm selfTerm, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres)
    Creates an empty, default loop invariant for the passed loop.
    LoopSpecImpl(LoopStatement loop, IProgramMethod pm, KeYJavaType kjt, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> modifiable, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec>> infFlowSpecs, JTerm variant, JTerm selfTerm, ImmutableList<JTerm> localIns, ImmutableList<JTerm> localOuts, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres)
    Creates a loop invariant.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LoopSpecification
    configurate(Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> modifiable, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec>> infFlowSpecs, JTerm variant)
    Configure the existing loop specification element with new elements, i.e., loop invariant clauses, a loop variant, modifiable clauses, information flow specification elements, and a loop variant, possibly together with (if any) "free" loop invariant clauses.
    LoopSpecification
    create(LoopStatement loop, IProgramMethod pm, KeYJavaType kjt, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> modifiable, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec>> infFlowSpecs, JTerm variant, JTerm selfTerm, ImmutableList<JTerm> localIns, ImmutableList<JTerm> localOuts, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres)
    Create and return a new loop specification element from the existing one where the arguments given are replaced.
    LoopSpecification
    create(LoopStatement loop, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> modifiable, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec>> infFlowSpecs, JTerm variant, JTerm selfTerm, ImmutableList<JTerm> localIns, ImmutableList<JTerm> localOuts, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres)
    Create and return a new loop specification element from the existing one where the arguments given are replaced.

    Returns operators internally used for the pre-heap.

    Returns the term internally used for the invariant.

    instantiate(Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, JTerm variant)
    Instantiate a (raw) loop specification with loop invariant clauses and a loop variant, possibly together with (if any) "free" loop invariant clauses.
    LoopSpecification
    map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
    Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
    LoopSpecification
    setInvariant(Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, JTerm selfTerm, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres, Services services)
    Returns a new loop invariant where the invariant formula has been replaced with the passed one.
    LoopSpecification
    setLoop(LoopStatement loop)
    Returns a new loop invariant where the loop reference has been replaced with the passed one.
    LoopSpecification
    setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT, IObserverFunction newPM)
     
    LoopSpecification
    setTarget(IProgramMethod newPM)
     
    String
    toString()
     
    void
    visit(Visitor v)
    Loop invariants can be visited like source elements: This method calls the corresponding method of a visitor in order to perform some action/transformation on this element.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • LoopSpecImpl

      public LoopSpecImpl(LoopStatement loop, IProgramMethod pm, KeYJavaType kjt, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> modifiable, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec>> infFlowSpecs, JTerm variant, JTerm selfTerm, ImmutableList<JTerm> localIns, ImmutableList<JTerm> localOuts, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres)
      Creates a loop invariant.
      Parameters:
      loop - the loop to which the invariant belongs.
      pm - the method containing the loop.
      kjt - the type of the class containing the method.
      invariants - the invariant formula for each heap.
      freeInvariants - the free invariant formula for each heap.
      modifiable - the modifiable clause for each heap.
      freeModifiable - the free modifiable clause for each heap.
      infFlowSpecs - low variables for information flow.
      variant - the variant term.
      selfTerm - the term used for the receiver object.
      localIns - the local variables read in the loop.
      localOuts - the local variables written in the loop.
      atPres - the term used for the at pre variables.

    • LoopSpecImpl

      public LoopSpecImpl(LoopStatement loop, IProgramMethod pm, KeYJavaType kjt, JTerm selfTerm, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres)
      Creates an empty, default loop invariant for the passed loop.
      Parameters:
      loop - the loop to which the invariant belongs.
      pm - the method containing the loop.
      kjt - the type of the class containing the method.
      selfTerm - the term used for the receiver object.
      atPres - the term used for the at pre variables.

  • Method Details

    • map

      public LoopSpecification map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface LoopSpecification
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.

      selfTerm - the self term.

    • getInternalInvariants

      public Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> getInternalInvariants()
      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Returns the term internally used for the invariant. Use with care - it is likely that this is *not* the right "self" for you.
      Specified by:
      getInternalInvariants in interface LoopSpecification
      Returns:
      The map with an invariant for each heap location.

    • getInternalFreeInvariants

      public Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> getInternalFreeInvariants()
      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Returns the term internally used for the "free" invariant. Use with care - it is likely that this is *not* the right "self" for you.
      Specified by:
      getInternalFreeInvariants in interface LoopSpecification
      Returns:
      The map with a "free" invariant for each heap location.

      Returns:
      The variant clause as a term.

    • create

      public LoopSpecification create(LoopStatement loop, IProgramMethod pm, KeYJavaType kjt, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> modifiable, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec>> infFlowSpecs, JTerm variant, JTerm selfTerm, ImmutableList<JTerm> localIns, ImmutableList<JTerm> localOuts, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres)
      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Create and return a new loop specification element from the existing one where the arguments given are replaced.
      Specified by:
      create in interface LoopSpecification
      Parameters:
      loop - the new loop statement.
      pm - the new program method.
      kjt - the new KeYJavaType.
      invariants - the new loop invariant clauses.
      freeInvariants - the new "free" loop invariant clauses.
      modifiable - the new modifiable clauses.
      freeModifiable - the new free modifiable clauses.
      infFlowSpecs - the new information flow specification elements.
      variant - the new loop variant term.
      selfTerm - the new self term.
      localIns - the new local in-variables.
      localOuts - the new local out-variables.
      atPres - the new operators used for the pre-heap.
      Returns:
      The new loop specification element.

    • create

      public LoopSpecification create(LoopStatement loop, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> modifiable, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec>> infFlowSpecs, JTerm variant, JTerm selfTerm, ImmutableList<JTerm> localIns, ImmutableList<JTerm> localOuts, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres)
      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Create and return a new loop specification element from the existing one where the arguments given are replaced.
      Specified by:
      create in interface LoopSpecification
      Parameters:
      loop - the new loop statement.
      invariants - the new loop invariant clauses.
      freeInvariants - the new "free" loop invariant clauses.
      modifiable - the new modifiable clauses.
      freeModifiable - the new free modifiable clauses.
      infFlowSpecs - the new information flow specification elements.
      variant - the new loop variant term.
      selfTerm - the new self term.
      localIns - the new local in-variables.
      localOuts - the new local out-variables.
      atPres - the new operators used for the pre-heap.
      Returns:
      The new loop specification element.

    • instantiate

      public LoopSpecification instantiate(Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, JTerm variant)
      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Instantiate a (raw) loop specification with loop invariant clauses and a loop variant, possibly together with (if any) "free" loop invariant clauses.
      Specified by:
      instantiate in interface LoopSpecification
      Parameters:
      invariants - the loop invariant clauses for instantiation.
      freeInvariants - the "free" loop invariant clauses for instantiation.
      variant - the loop variant for instantiation.
      Returns:
      the instantiated loop specification.

    • configurate

      public LoopSpecification configurate(Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> modifiable, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeModifiable, Map<LocationVariable,ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec>> infFlowSpecs, JTerm variant)
      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Configure the existing loop specification element with new elements, i.e., loop invariant clauses, a loop variant, modifiable clauses, information flow specification elements, and a loop variant, possibly together with (if any) "free" loop invariant clauses.
      Specified by:
      configurate in interface LoopSpecification
      Parameters:
      invariants - the new loop invariant clauses.
      freeInvariants - the new "free" loop invariant clauses.
      modifiable - the new modifiable clauses.
      freeModifiable - the new free modifiable clauses.
      infFlowSpecs - the new information flow specification elements.
      variant - the new loop variant.
      Returns:
      The configured loop specification.

    • setLoop

      public LoopSpecification setLoop(LoopStatement loop)
      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Returns a new loop invariant where the loop reference has been replaced with the passed one.
      Specified by:
      setLoop in interface LoopSpecification

    • setTarget

      public LoopSpecification setTarget(IProgramMethod newPM)
      Specified by:
      setTarget in interface LoopSpecification

    • setInvariant

      public LoopSpecification setInvariant(Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> invariants, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> freeInvariants, JTerm selfTerm, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Returns a new loop invariant where the invariant formula has been replaced with the passed one. Take care: the variables used for the receiver, parameters, and local variables must stay the same!
      Specified by:
      setInvariant in interface LoopSpecification
      Parameters:
      invariants - the loop invariant clauses.
      freeInvariants - the "free" loop invariant clauses.
      selfTerm - the self term.
      atPres - the operators used for the pre-heap.
      services - the Services object.
      Returns:
      The new loop invariant.

      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Loop invariants can be visited like source elements: This method calls the corresponding method of a visitor in order to perform some action/transformation on this element.

      visit in interface LoopSpecification

    • getPlainText

      public String getPlainText(Services services, boolean usePrettyPrinting, boolean useUnicodeSymbols, boolean hidePackagePrefix)
      Return a plain text representation of this loop specification.
      Parameters:
      services - the services object
      usePrettyPrinting - determines whether we get pretty or raw text
      useUnicodeSymbols - determines whether unicode will be used
      hidePackagePrefix -
      Returns:
      the plain text representation as a string

    • getPlainText

      public String getPlainText(Services services, Iterable<LocationVariable> heapContext, boolean usePrettyPrinting, boolean useUnicodeSymbols, boolean hidePackagePrefix)
      Description copied from interface: LoopSpecification
      Returns the invariant in pretty plain text format.
      Specified by:
      getPlainText in interface LoopSpecification
      Parameters:
      services - the Services object.
      heapContext - all corresponding heaps.
      usePrettyPrinting - whether the text should be pretty-printed.
      useUnicodeSymbols - whether Unicode symbols should be used.
      hidePackagePrefix -
      Returns:
      a String containing the plain text representation of this invariant.
